robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: Interactive 3D qubit visualization — drag to rotate, apply X/Y/Z/H/S/T gates, see state vector update in real time.

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Create Bell pairs, measure one qubit, watch the other collapse. Run 100 experiments, see perfect correlation statistics.

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Quantum search algorithm — watch amplitude amplification find the target. Compare √N quantum steps vs N classical steps.
